evals.prompt: I have a call tomorrow with the owner of a dental office. They came inbound from our landing page. How do I structure the call and what questions should I ask?
evals.expected_output: Apply SPIN framework, include upfront contract, dental-office pain questions, 30-min structure, warn against early pitching.
expectations: The response uses a SPIN or similar discovery framework
The response recommends starting with an upfront contract
The response provides specific Implication questions for dental office pain
The response gives a 30-minute structure with time allocations
The response warns against pitching before discovery is complete

evals.prompt: We had a deal with an HVAC company. They were interested, then went silent after I sent the proposal. What happened and how do I recover it?
evals.expected_output: Diagnose specific causes (shallow discovery, premature proposal, no next step), apply Gap Selling, recommend recovery outreach with implication questions.
expectations: The response diagnoses specific causes: shallow discovery, premature proposal, no committed next step
The response applies Gap Selling to identify what we do not know
The response recommends specific recovery outreach with implication questions
The response does not suggest generic follow-up

evals.prompt: I have 5 deals in my pipeline. None of them have moved in 2 weeks. Help me review them.
evals.expected_output: Apply MEDDPICC diagnostic to each deal, identify missing fields, ask targeted stage-specific questions, recommend specific interventions.
expectations: The response applies MEDDPICC diagnostic framework
The response identifies specific missing fields (economic buyer, decision process)
The response asks questions tailored to each deal stage
The response recommends specific intervention actions
